items.title: Today, a closer look at the Pacers two-way moves and what it signals about the rest of their roster. Taelon Peter out for Jalen Slawson, duh. Could they keep 15 players now?
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Today, a closer look at the Pacers two-way moves and what it signals about the rest of their roster. Taelon Peter out for Jalen Slawson, duh. Could they keep 15 players now?

Listen: locked-on-pacers-daily-podcast-on-the-indiana-pacers.simplecast.com
Watch: www.youtube.com/watch?v=b9re...

items.title: Jalen Slawson will be signing a two-way contract with the Pacers, league source confirms. @mikeascotto.bsky.social first to it. (Again). Pacers opened a two-way slot yesterday when they waived Taelon Peter.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Jalen Slawson will be signing a two-way contract with the Pacers, league source confirms. @mikeascotto.bsky.social first to it. (Again). Pacers opened a two-way slot yesterday when they waived Taelon Peter.

Pacers waived guard Taelon Peter, who signed a two-year two-way contract before his rookie season.

They have Kobe Brown and Ethan Thompson on two-ways, and now one vacant spot. Jalen Slawson was the standout player at Summer League.

items.title: The Indiana Pacers are waiving two-way guard Taelon Peter, league sources told HoopsHype. Peter averaged 4.5 points in 38 games played for Indiana last season after being the 54th pick of the 2025 NBA Draft.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Indiana Pacers are waiving two-way guard Taelon Peter, league sources told HoopsHype. Peter averaged 4.5 points in 38 games played for Indiana last season after being the 54th pick of the 2025 NBA Draft.

items.title: Pacers with a 23-16 lead after one quarter in their Vegas finale. Braden Smith with some solid passing and transition work early. Pacers stumbled when he exited the game. Taelon Peter and and Rienk Mast each have 5 points.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Pacers with a 23-16 lead after one quarter in their Vegas finale. Braden Smith with some solid passing and transition work early. Pacers stumbled when he exited the game. Taelon Peter and and Rienk Mast each have 5 points.

items.title: If you read my article on Braden Smith's SL debut, you know I called for more off-ball switching to keep Jalen Slawson as the low-man. Watch Slawson. Swaps places w/ Taelon Peter & ends up swatting the shot at the rim.
items.author: Caitlin Cooper
items.body_excerpt:
If you read my article on Braden Smith's SL debut, you know I called for more off-ball switching to keep Jalen Slawson as the low-man. Watch Slawson. Swaps places w/ Taelon Peter & ends up swatting the shot at the rim.

More observations from Game 2: www.patreon.com/basketballsh...

media.title: Second-year Pacers guard using Summer League to lead even with roster spot not guaranteed
media.description: Taelon Peter is the only player on this year's Pacers' NBA Summer League roster who was also on last year's summer squad.

items.title: Small thing: With Braden Smith heading towards a two-way, Jalen Slawson's offer sheet suggests a battle for two-way slots is coming for the Pacers. Ethan Thompson and Taelon Peter signed two-year two-way deals last year: www.forbes.com/sites/tonyea...
